form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last over 450m at Ballarat beaten 6 lengths (26.22) behind Paw Pharah in a T3 RSTW on April 13. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head outwards approaching winning post.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.67) when seventh over 390m at Ballarat in a Grade 5. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 400m at this track behind Bush Profit beaten 14 lengths (23.42). Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 525m at The Meadows. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.61) at Ballarat in a T3 RSTW, finishing third and beaten 1.75 lengths. Yet to score but has placed each of two runs from this draw. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.
